name: orchy
description: Orchy - Multi-agent orchestrator for Claude Code

scripts.build: npm run build:types && npm run build -w orchestrator-backend && npm run build -w orchestrator-web
scripts.dev: NODE_ENV=development npm run build:types && concurrently -k -n backend,web -c blue,green "npm run dev -w orchestrator-backend" "npm run dev -w orchestrator-web"
